zh.Church Barham, Barham, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特巴哈姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當Albina Northwode於大約1315年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Roger de Northwode9歲，母親Juliana de Saye8歲。她於大約1350年1月與Simon Cheptede結婚。她去世於大約1395年在英國英格蘭肯特巴哈姆享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albina Northwode于大约1315年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Roger de Northwode9岁，母亲Juliana de Saye8岁。她于大约1350年1月与Simon Cheptede结婚。她去世于大约1395年在英国英格兰肯特巴哈姆享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Albinus, a derivative of the Roman family name Albius, which is from albus ‘white’. It is the name of a minor saint: St Albina , who was martyred at Caesarea in 250 . She is particularly venerated in Campania, where her relics are preserved to this day.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Albina Northwode was born about 1315, in Kent, England, her father, Roger de Northwode, was 9 and her mother, Juliana de Saye, was 8. She married Simon Cheptede about January 1350. She died about 1395, in Barham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albina Northwode est née environ 1315, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Northwode, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Saye, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Simon Cheptede environ janvier 1350. Elle est décédée environ 1395, à Barham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albina Northwode um 1315 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Northwode 9 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Saye 8. Sie hat um Januar 1350 Simon Cheptede geheiratet. Sie starb um 1395 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Barham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albina Northwode è nata il circa 1315 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Roger de Northwode, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Saye, aveva 8 anni. Lei sposato Simon Cheptede circa gennaio 1350. Morì circa 1395, nel Barham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albina Northwodeが約1315年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Roger de Northwodeは9歳，母Juliana de Sayeは8歳であった。約1350年1月にSimon Cheptedeと結婚した。彼女は約1395年にイギリスイギリスケントバーハムで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albina Northwode(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Northwode(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Saye(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 1월 Simon Cheptede(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 바람에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albina Northwode nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Northwode, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Saye, tinha 8 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon Cheptede aproximadamente janeiro de 1350. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1395, em Barham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albina Northwode родилась около 1315 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Northwode было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Saye, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon Cheptede около январь 1350 г. Она умерла около 1395 г. в местности барам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albina Northwode nació aproximadamente 1315, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Northwode, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Juliana de Saye, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Simon Cheptede aproximadamente enero de 1350. Murió aproximadamente 1395, en Barham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
